title: IIT Kanpur is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: IIT Kanpur is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kanpur, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kanpur:
IIT Kanpur is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kanpur!
